title: AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE PROVINCIAL CAPITAL OF THE PROVINCE OF COTABATO TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF SULTAN SA BAROÃGIS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4532 / 57 OG No. 14, 2463 (April 3, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2914, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE PROVINCIAL CAPITAL OF THE PROVINCE OF COTABATO TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF SULTAN SA BAROÃGIS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Municipality of Sultan sa Baroñgis, Province of Cotabato, shall be the capital of said province: Provided, That, until the necessary buildings to be used for housing the different offices of the Provincial Government of Cotabato shall have been constructed, the City of Cotabato shall continue to be the capital of the Province of Cotabato.

SEC. 2. The Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
